description: Open-source AI agent operating system for orchestrating multi-agent workflows and autonomous task execution.

topics.name: AI Agent OS
topics.definition: An operating system designed to orchestrate multiple AI agents, managing task allocation, inter-agent communication, and resource scheduling.

topics.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
topics.definition: Coordination of multiple AI agents working collaboratively on complex tasks, handling dependencies, conflicts, and resource sharing.

topics.name: Autonomous Task Execution
topics.definition: AI systems that independently plan, execute, and verify task completion without human intervention for each step.
